generated_llmstxt_full:
# Match your resume to any job in seconds
> We compare your resume to real job requirements and show exactly what's missing — before you apply.

## Main Pages
- [Resume Examples](https://pitchcv.app/examples): Browse resume examples by specialty. Open each role card, review the sample structure, and adapt it to your target vacancy.
- [ATS Checker](https://pitchcv.app/tools/ats-checker): Use our free ATS resume checker to see if your CV passes applicant tracking systems. Find missing keywords and formatting errors instantly.
- [Check ATS Score Free](https://pitchcv.app#upload-zone): We compare your resume to real job requirements and show exactly what's missing — before you apply.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pitchcv.app/privacy): Pitch My CV privacy policy: what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it for subscription-based resume analytics services.
- [Software Engineer](https://pitchcv.app/examples/software-engineer): Learn how to write a software engineer resume that passes ATS filters. Get examples of summaries, skills, and achievements to land more tech interviews.
- [Marketing Manager](https://pitchcv.app/examples/marketing-manager): Build a marketing manager resume that passes ATS systems. See examples for summary, campaign metrics, and keyword-ready skills sections.
- [ATS Resume Checklist](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-checklist): Comprehensive ATS resume checklist: format, keywords, bullet quality, section order, and final validation steps to improve interview chances.
- [ATS Resume Mistakes](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-mistakes): Detailed guide to ATS resume mistakes: formatting issues, keyword errors, weak bullets, and practical fixes to improve interview conversion.
- [Resume Keyword Optimization](https://pitchcv.app/resume-keyword-optimization): Advanced resume keyword optimization guide for ATS: extract role terms, prioritize intent keywords, place them naturally, and validate match quality.
- [Data Processing](https://pitchcv.app/data-processing): Data Processing Policy of MARYSCHAKGROUP LTD for Pitch My CV: purposes, legal bases, retention periods, transfers, and user rights.
- [Public Offer](https://pitchcv.app/terms): Public offer for Pitch My CV subscription and resume analysis tools, including payment terms, liability limits, and Gemini AI usage conditions.

## Products & Services
- [Pricing](https://pitchcv.app/pricing): Choose a Pitch My CV plan: Free, Trial 7 days, or Monthly. ATS scans, AI resume optimization, job tailoring, and PDF export.
- [Product Manager](https://pitchcv.app/examples/product-manager): Learn how to write a product manager resume that passes ATS checks. See summary, skills, and achievement examples for PM roles.

## Resources & Blog
- [Blog](https://pitchcv.app/blog): In-depth ATS resume guides from Pitch My CV: resume checklists, common ATS mistakes, keyword optimization, and practical interview-winning resume tips.

## Company
- [Career Guides](https://pitchcv.app/careers): Explore ATS-friendly resume guides by role. Learn what recruiters and HR check first, avoid common mistakes, and boost interview chances with clear examples.
- [About](https://pitchcv.app/about): Learn about Pitch My CV, our mission, and how our ATS-focused tools help job seekers improve resume quality and interview rates.
- [Contact](https://pitchcv.app/contact): Contact Pitch My CV for product support, partnership requests, and privacy inquiries.

## Contact
- Website: https://pitchcv.app
- Email: contact@pitchcv.app
